emails.subject: CPUC workshop- conference call
emails.body: CPUC workshop- conference call Sorry for the late notice, but is it possible to get together by telephone tomorrow at around 10:00 a.m. CDT to discuss the upcoming CPUC workshop and how TW and Enron should be engaged in that process? Mark, Jeff, we'll initiate the call here from Houston.

emails.subject: RE: CPUC workshop- conference call
emails.body: RE: CPUC workshop- conference call Sorry I can't make it; I have a conflict. I suggest you meet without me and I can catch up later. To: Scott, Susan; Dasovich, Jeff; 'mbaldwin@igservice.com'
